array.string:
dialog_tool="$OMC_OMC_SUPPORT_PATH/omc_dialog_control" UUID="$OMC_ACTIONUI_WINDOW_UUID"
# 1. Present alert and dismiss programmatically (tests omc_present_alert + omc_dismiss_dialog) "$dialog_tool" "$UUID" omc_window omc_present_alert "Test Alert" "Alert from automated test" "$dialog_tool" "$UUID" omc_window omc_dismiss_dialog
# 2. Present confirmation dialog and dismiss programmatically (tests omc_present_confirmation_dialog) "$dialog_tool" "$UUID" omc_window omc_present_confirmation_dialog "Test Confirm" "Confirmation from automated test" "OK::confirm_action" "Cancel:cancel:" "$dialog_tool" "$UUID" omc_window omc_dismiss_dialog
# 3. Present modal sheet with dismiss action, then dismiss programmatically # omc_dismiss_modal fires "modal.dismiss.action" subcommand which writes its own diagnostic file "$dialog_tool" "$UUID" omc_window omc_present_modal "Sheet" "modal.dismiss.action" "$dialog_tool" "$UUID" omc_window omc_dismiss_modal
# 4. Populate template VStack (id=2) with single-column data via omc_list_set_items # Tests that OMC does not restrict setElementRows to List/Table only "$dialog_tool" "$UUID" 2 omc_list_set_items "Apple" "Banana" "Cherry"
# 5. Populate template VStack (id=3) with multi-column data via omc_table_set_rows # Tests multi-column template container support "$dialog_tool" "$UUID" 3 omc_table_set_rows "star.fill Favorites" "heart.fill Liked"
# Write init diagnostic atomically init_file="/tmp/OMC_test_modal_init_${UUID}" { echo "INIT_COMPLETE=YES" echo "OMC_ACTIONUI_WINDOW_UUID=${UUID}" } > "${init_file}.tmp" mv "${init_file}.tmp" "$init_file"
WINDOW_UUID="${OMC_OBJ_TEXT}" if [ -n "${WINDOW_UUID}" ]; then "$OMC_OMC_SUPPORT_PATH/omc_dialog_control" "$WINDOW_UUID" omc_window omc_terminate_cancel fi

dict.string: Test command: receive UUID as text context, close window
